cot_prefix: Okay, so the question is about time zones. It asks, "What time is it in France when it is 2 pm in China?" The choices are (A) About 11 am, (B) About 2 am, (C) About 8 pm, (D) About 5 pm. First, I need to recall the time difference between China and France. I remember that China uses one time zone (China Standard Time, UTC+8) across the entire country, while France is in the Central European Time zone (CET, UTC+1) and Central European Summer Time (CEST, UTC+2) during daylight saving time.
